Warewulf v4.7.0 is a feature release, with significant changes relative to the
v4.6.x series.

- Documentation audit
- New `wwctl unset` command
- Refactored server routes (URLs)
- New /files/ route for serving individual files and templates
- Server TLS support
- Removed support for fetching individual overlays and individual files from
  overlays
- Fixed whitespace handling around template functions
- Security fixes, including updated Go and library versions

Significant changes are detailed in the [release
notes](https://warewulf.org/docs/main/release/v4.7.0.html). Additional changes
may be listed in the
[CHANGELOG](https://github.com/warewulf/warewulf/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
